rows.description: Recepta varia
rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini.

rows.description: Nov^r 10, 1774 Dr. Shortridge's Benef. half a year to Mids^r
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description from gemini-flash for better rendering of abbreviations ('^r').

rows.description: Nov: 22- Mr. Bloomfield's Plate Money
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description from gemini-flash, which is a more faithful transcription of the visible text and punctuation.

rows.description: Jan: 30, 1775 Exchequer Annuity to Xmas
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description from gemini-flash for more accurate integration of date and punctuation.

rows.description: Mids^r. & Xmas Div: in Stock, 3 p^r cent: consol:
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description from gemini-flash as it more accurately transcribes the abbreviations ('^r' and 'p^r').

rows.description: Mart: 20 Increment. of Mr. Richards, Bursar
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description from gemini-flash for closer visual match of 'Mart:'.

rows.description: Apr: 3 Took out of the Chest for L. Wittenham Div:
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description from gemini-flash for slightly more compact transcription.

rows.description: Jun. 5. Two Sconces for Bac: Disp:
rows.notes: Amounts are consensual. Chose gemini-flash's description as visual verification confirms 'Jun. 5.' in the margin, overriding gpt-5-mini's 'Jan. 5'.

rows.description: Dr. Shortridge's Benef. half a year to Xmas-
rows.notes: Amounts are consensual. Chose gemini-flash's description as visual verification confirms no specific marginal date for this line, overriding gpt-5-mini's inferred 'Jan. 5'.

rows.description: June Mr. Oswald Jackson's Acct. for the Rector estate for the Year from Micr. 1773 to Mids. 1774
rows.notes: Consensus on empty amounts. Chose gemini-flash's description as visual verification confirms inclusion of marginal 'June' and 'Rector' estate, overriding gpt-5-mini's omissions/misinterpretations.

rows.description: Money Rent -
rows.notes: Chose gemini-flash's amounts as visual verification clearly shows £265, overriding gpt-5-mini's £205. Description from gemini-flash (includes dash).

rows.description: Corn Rent -
rows.notes: Amounts are consensual. Chose gemini-flash's description ('Corn Rent') because gpt-5-mini's notes indicated uncertainty, and visual verification clearly shows 'Corn Rent', overriding gpt-5-mini's 'Goth Rent'.

Consensus on amounts. Chose gemini-flash's empty description as the ledger line itself has no descriptive text for this total. Verified amount visually and confirmed it's the correct sum of the preceding two entries (265 + 7 = 272).

rows.description: Allowed Land Tax -
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description from gemini-flash (includes dash).

rows.description: Rent for 3 Closes -
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts and fraction. Description from gemini-flash (includes dash). Both correctly interpret '2/4' as 0.5 pence.

rows.description: Deduct -
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts and fraction. Description from gemini-flash (includes dash). Summation of preceding entries confirmed correct.

rows.description: July 22? - Reed Balance
rows.notes: Pounds, shillings, pence_whole are consensual. Overrode fraction to 0.25 based on clear '¼' in the far-right summary column, which clarifies the ambiguous '2' in the main pence column. Description from gemini-flash for 'Reed Balance'.

rows.description: July 26. Increment from Mr. Newbery, Bursar
rows.notes: Consensus on all amounts and fraction. Description from gemini-flash, as it is a direct transcription of the visible text.

rows.description: Aug. 17. Took out of the College Chest
rows.notes: Consensus on all amounts. Description from gemini-flash.

rows.description: Jul. 22. House Fees from Mr. Sarrande, Dean
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Chose gemini-flash's description as visual verification indicates 'Sarrande' rather than 'Savande'.

Consensus on pounds, shillings, pence_whole. Overrode fraction to 0.25 based on visual interpretation of the superscript '4' as one farthing (1/4d), consistent with common ledger notation. gpt-5-mini had this fraction value correct. Description is empty as there is no text on the ledger for this subtotal line.

rows.description: Recepta pro hoc anno et pro debitis anni praecedentis
rows.notes: Chose gemini-flash's extraction. Visual verification confirms this is a distinct Latin header text (multi-line) with no associated monetary amounts. gpt-5-mini incorrectly combined this header with the final total row and assigned it amounts.
Chose gemini-flash's extraction. Visual verification confirms this final total amount. gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this total with the preceding Latin header.
